description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The front facade features a combination of large windows, vertical blue accent panels, and a simple entryway with a paved walkway. The rear of the house includes a spacious balcony and a rectangular swimming pool, both enclosed by glass railings. The side elevation reveals a large garage door and additional horizontal window strips, while the other side is mostly solid with minimal fenestration. The interior layout is open-plan, with visible living, dining, and kitchen areas, as well as a prominent staircase and upper-level rooms. The exterior is finished in light gray with contrasting black and blue elements, giving the house a sleek, contemporary appearance.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a rooftop pool, featuring minimalist lines and a light gray exterior with blue accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, vertical blue accent panels, and large windows on a light gray facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage door, horizontal window strips, and the rear balcony with a glass-enclosed pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, balcony, and open-plan interior spaces with visible room divisions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a mostly solid wall and minimal window openings, emphasizing the house's geometric form.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flush door with vertical blue accent panels, no porch or overhang, accessed via a paved walkway
